channel.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.description:
Papers

  • FinRL: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Library for Automated Stock Trading in Quantitative Finance, 2020 - Introduce a DRL library FinRL that facilitates beginners to expose themselves to quantitative finance and to develop their own stock trading strategies.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Apr 25th, 2021
item.description:
Others

Other Resource

  • 🌟🌟🌟 Stock-Prediction-Modelsstars5.5k - Stock-Prediction-Models, Gathers machine learning and deep learning models for Stock forecasting, included trading bots and simulations.
  • 🌟🌟 Financial Machine Learningstars2.9k - A curated list of practical financial machine learning (FinML) tools and applications. This collection is primarily in Python.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Nov 27th, 2020
item.description:
Papers

  • Deep Reinforcement Learning for Automated Stock Trading: An Ensemble Strategy, 2020 - Propose an ensemble strategy that employs deep reinforcement schemes to learn a stock trading strategy by maximizing investment return.

    • Strategies & Research

    Time Series Data

  • 🌟 Ensemble-Strategystars1.2k - Deep Reinforcement Learning for Automated Stock Trading.
  • FinRLstars6.2k - A Deep Reinforcement Learning Library for Automated Stock Trading in Quantitative Finance.

  • High-Frequency-Trading-Model-with-IBstars2k - A high-frequency trading model using Interactive Brokers API with pairs and mean-reversion.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Aug 1st, 2020
item.description:
Strategies & Research

Time Series Data

  • tf_deep_rl_traderstars204 - Trading environment(OpenAI Gym) + PPO(TensorForce).
  • deep_rl_traderstars337 - Trading environment(OpenAI Gym) + DDQN (Keras-RL).
  • stock_market_reinforcement_learningstars765 - Stock market trading OpenAI Gym environment with Deep Reinforcement Learning using Keras.

    • Strategies & Research

    Portfolio Management

  • qtraderstars402 - Reinforcement Learning for portfolio management.
  • PGPortfoliostars1.5k - A Deep Reinforcement Learning framework for the financial portfolio management problem.

    • Strategies & Research

    Crypto Currencies Strategies

  • tforce_btc_traderstars776 - TensorForce Bitcoin trading bot.
  • gekkogastars303 - Genetic algorithm for solving optimization of trading strategies using Gekko.

    • Strategies & Research

    Technical Analysis

  • Bitcoin_MACD_Strategystars8 - Bitcoin MACD crossover trading strategy backtest.
  • crypto-signalstars4.2k - Automated crypto trading & technical analysis (TA) bot for Bittrex, Binance, GDAX, and more.

    • Data Sources

    Crypto Currencies

  • Gekko-Datasetsstars153 - Gekko trading bot dataset dumps. Download and use history files in SQLite format.

    • Research Tools

  • 🌟🌟 TensorTradestars4k - Trade efficiently with reinforcement learning.
  • empyricalstars986 - Common financial risk and performance metrics. Used by Zipline and pyfolio.

    • Trading System

    Traditional Market

  • 🌟🌟 ziplinestars15.5k - A python algorithmic trading library.
  • backtraderstars9.4k - Python backtesting library for trading strategies.
  • kungfustars2.7k - Kungfu Master trading system.

    • Trading System

    Crypto Currencies

  • catalyststars2.4k - An algorithmic trading library for Crypto-Assets in python.

    • TA Lib

  • tulipnodestars439 - Official Node.js wrapper for Tulip Indicators. Provides over 100 technical analysis overlay and indicator functions.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Jul 30th, 2020
item.description:
Papers

  • An Investigation into the Use of Reinforcement Learning Techniques within the Algorithmic Trading Domain, 2015
  • Reinforcement Learning for Trading, 1994
  • Ten Financial Applications of Machine Learning, 2018 - Slides review few important financial ML applications.

    • Data Sources

    Traditional Markets

  • Tusharestars11.8k - Crawling historical data of Chinese stocks.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Jul 28th, 2020
item.description:
Courses & Books & Blogs

  • Advanced-Deep-Tradingstars414 - Experiments based on "Advances in financial machine learning" book.

    • Strategies & Research

    Time Series Data

  • 🌟🌟 stockpredictionaistars3.5k - A complete process for predicting stock price movements.
  • trading-gymstars221 - Trading agent to train with episode of short term trading itself.
  • DeepLearningNotesstars332 - Machine learning in quant analysis.

    • Strategies & Research

    Portfolio Management

  • Deep-Reinforcement-Stock-Tradingstars312 - A light-weight deep reinforcement learning framework for portfolio management.

    • Strategies & Research

    High Frequency Trading

  • 🌟 SGX-Full-OrderBook-Tick-Data-Trading-Strategystars1.2k - Solutions for high-frequency trading (HFT) strategies using data science approaches (Machine Learning) on Full Orderbook Tick Data.

    • Strategies & Research

    Event Drive

  • 🌟🌟 stockpredictionaistars3.5k - Complete process for predicting stock price movements.

    • Strategies & Research

    Crypto Currencies Strategies

  • LSTM-Crypto-Price-Predictionstars234 - Predicting price trends in crypto markets using an LSTM-RNN for trading.
  • Tensorflow-NeuroEvolution-Trading-Botstars137 - A population model that trade cyrpto and breed and mutate iteratively.
  • bitcoin_predictionstars231 - Code for "Bitcoin Prediction" by Siraj Raval on YouTube.

    • Strategies & Research

    Technical Analysis

  • gekko_trading_stuffstars110 - Awesome crypto currency trading platform.

    • Strategies & Research

    Arbitrage

  • r2stars718 - Automatic arbitrage trading system powered by Node.js + TypeScript.
  • cryptocurrency-arbitragestars1k - A crypto currency arbitrage opportunity calculator. Over 800 currencies and 50 markets.
  • bitcoin-arbitragestars2.2k - Bitcoin arbitrage opportunity detector.
  • blackbirdstars5.6k - Long / short market-neutral strategy.

    • Data Sources

    Traditional Markets

  • 🌟 Quandl - Get millions of financial and economic dataset from hundreds of publishers via a single free API.

    • Data Sources

    Crypto Currencies

  • CryptoInscriberstars35 - A live crypto currency historical trade data blotter. Download live historical trade data from any crypto exchange.

    • Research Tools

  • JAQSstars577 - An open source quant strategies research platform.

    • Trading System

    Traditional Market

  • rqalphastars4.7k - A extendable, replaceable Python algorithmic backtest & trading framework.

    • Trading System

    Crypto Currencies

  • zenbotstars8.2k - Command-line crypto currency trading bot using Node.js and MongoDB.
  • bot18stars188 - High-frequency crypto currency trading bot developed by Zenbot.
  • magic8botstars312 - Crypto currency trading bot using Node.js and MongoDB.
  • MACD - Zenbot MACD Auto-Trader.

    • Trading System

    Plugins

  • CoinMarketCapBacktestingstars3 - Tests bt and Quantopian Zipline as backtesting frameworks for coin trading strategy.
  • Gekko-BacktestToolstars219 - Batch backtest, import and strategy params optimalization for Gekko Trading Bot.

    • Exchange API

  • HuobiFeederstars38 - Connect HUOBIPRO exchange, get market/historical data for ABAT trading platform backtest analysis and live trading.

    • Exchange API

    GYM Environment

  • 🌟 TradingGymstars1.1k - Trading and Backtesting environment for training reinforcement learning agent.
  • TradzQAIstars163 - Trading environment for RL agents, backtesting and training.

    • Others

  • zipline-tensorboardstars107 - TensorBoard as a Zipline dashboard.

    • Others

    Other Resource

  • 🌟 Awesome-Quant-Machine-Learning-Tradingstars1.6k - Quant / Algorithm trading resources with an emphasis on Machine Learning.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Papers

  • The Theory of Speculation L. Bachelier, 1900 - The influences which determine the movements of the Stock Exchange are.
  • Brownian Motion in the Stock Market Osborne, 1959 - The common-stock prices can be regarded as an ensemble of decisions in statistical equilibrium.
  • Dragon-Kings, Black Swans and the Prediction of Crises Didier Sornette - The power laws in the distributions of event sizes under a broad range of conditions in a large variety of systems.
  • Financial Trading as a Game: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach - Deep reinforcement learning provides a framework toward end-to-end training of such trading agent.
  • Machine Learning for Trading - With an appropriate choice of the reward function, reinforcement learning techniques can successfully handle the risk-averse case.

    • Courses & Books & Blogs

  • Advances in Financial Machine Learning - Using advanced ML solutions to overcome real-world investment problems.

    • Strategies & Research

    Time Series Data

  • 🌟 Personaestars1.2k - Implements and environment of Deep Reinforcement Learning & Supervised Learning for Quantitative Trading.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Jul 21st, 2020
item.description:
Articles

  • The-Economiststars3.1k - The Economist.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Jul 15th, 2020
item.description:
Papers

  • A Deep Reinforcement Learning Framework for the Financial Portfolio Management Problem

    • Courses & Books & Blogs

  • AI in Finance - Learn Fintech Online.

    • Strategies & Research

    Time Series Data

  • trading-rlstars203 - Deep Reinforcement Learning for Financial Trading using Price Trailing.
  • gym-tradingstars637 - Environment for reinforcement-learning algorithmic trading models.
  • zenbrainstars42 - A framework for machine-learning bots.

    • Strategies & Research

    Portfolio Management

  • DeepDowstars588 - Portfolio optimization with deep learning.

    • Strategies & Research

    High Frequency Trading

  • HFT_Bitcoinstars96 - Analysis of High Frequency Trading on Bitcoin exchanges.

    • Strategies & Research

    Event Drive

  • 🌟 trump2cashstars6.1k - A stock trading bot powered by Trump tweets.

    • Strategies & Research

    Crypto Currencies Strategies

  • Gekko_ANN_Strategiesstars50 - ANN trading strategies for the Gekko trading bot.
  • gekko-neuralnetstars96 - Neural network strategy for Gekko.

    • Strategies & Research

    Technical Analysis

  • quant-tradingstars3.4k - Python quantitative trading strategies.
  • Gekko-Bot-Resourcesstars196 - Gekko bot resources.
  • gekko_toolsstars148 - Gekko strategies, tools etc.
  • gekko RSI_WRstars3 - Gekko RSI_WR strategies.
  • gekko HLstars10 - Calculate down peak and trade on.
  • EthTradingAlgorithmstars2 - Ethereum trading algorithm using Python 3.5 and the library ZipLine.
  • forex.analyticsstars173 - Node.js native library performing technical analysis over an OHLC dataset with use of genetic algorithmv.
  • Gekko-Strategiesstars1.2k - Strategies to Gekko trading bot with backtests results and some useful tools.
  • gekko-gannswingstars65 - Gann's Swing trade strategy for Gekko trade bot.

    • Strategies & Research

    Lottery & Gamble

  • LotteryPredictstars317 - Use LSTM to predict lottery.

    • Strategies & Research

    Arbitrage

  • ArbitrageBotstars160 - Arbitrage bot that currently works on bittrex & poloniex.

    • Data Sources

    Traditional Markets

  • yahoo-financestars1.2k - Python module to get stock data from Yahoo! Finance.

    • Research Tools

  • pyfoliostars4.7k - Portfolio and risk analytics in Python.
  • alphalensstars2.4k - Performance analysis of predictive (alpha) stock factors.
  • zvtstars2.2k - Zero vector trader.

    • Trading System

    Traditional Market

  • 🌟 TradingView - Get real-time information and market insights.

    • Trading System

    Crypto Currencies

  • QuantResearchDevstars30 - Quant Research dev & Traders open source project.
  • abustars9.4k - A quant trading system base on python.

    • TA Lib

  • pandas_talibstars630 - A Python Pandas implementation of technical analysis indicators.
  • fintastars1.8k - Common financial technical indicators implemented in Python-Pandas (70+ indicators).
  • techan.jsstars2.3k - A visual, technical analysis and charting (Candlestick, OHLC, indicators) library built on D3.

    • Exchange API

  • IbPystars1.3k - Python API for the Interactive Brokers on-line trading system.
  • ctpwrapperstars371 - Shanghai future exchange CTP api.

    • Exchange API

    Framework

  • tf-quant-financestars3.3k - High-performance TensorFlow library for quantitative finance.

    • Exchange API

    Visualizing

  • playgroundstars10.6k - Play with neural networks.
  • netronstars20.2k - Visualizer for deep learning and machine learning models.

    • Exchange API

    GYM Environment

  • btgymstars910 - Scalable, event-driven, deep-learning-friendly backtesting library.

    • Articles

  • nyu-mlif-notesstars77 - NYU machine learning in finance notes.

    • Others

  • gekko-quasar-uistars111 - An UI port for gekko trading bot using Quasar framework.

    • Others

    Other Resource

  • awesome-quantstars10.6k - A curated list of insanely awesome libraries, packages and resources for Quants (Quantitative Finance).
